title: Cliffortia reniformis
taxonomy: Cliffortia reniformis is a species of flowering plant in the family Rhamnaceae. It is a succulent shrub native to the Western Cape province of South Africa. The plant is further classified within the genus Cliffortia, which is a group of flowering plants. Cliffortia reniformis belongs to the order Rosales and the clade Eurosids I. This classification places it within the broader context of the plant kingdom, indicating its evolutionary relationships with other species.
uses: Cliffortia reniformis is a plant species used in traditional medicine, particularly in South Africa. The leaves and stems of Cliffortia reniformis are said to be used to treat various ailments, including fever and digestive issues.
